2017HKDSE
You are the chairperson of the Social Services Club in your school. The school would like to develop closer links with the community. Write a letter to your principal, Ms Lee, proposing a new community project that the school can carry out with a home for the elderly in your district.

i) describing one activity that would be carried out; and
ii) identifying the benefits for the elderly home

Dear Principal,

I am Chris, the chairperson of the Social Service Club. Recently, I noticed that the teenagers does not have much caring of the community. For improving the relationship between our school and the society to get closer. I would like to writing a letter to suggest a activity and some benefits of carrying out with a home for the elderly.

The elderly have contributed our community a lot when they were young, they may miss out the time of enjoying the city, therefore, we could show them around to give more inspiration and caring to them. Their children sent them to the elderly home, some the aged may have less confidence. We can have a cooperation with the charity for helping the elderly, like The Hong Kong Society for the Aged. Our Social Service Club are planing to take them to visit some country parks with the geriatric nurse and as the charity have experience in outings. They could provide the good services and caring to them. The old people do not have enough exercises would lead to the diseases, and the suburbs have more fresh air could refresh their mind to think into positive. At the countrysides, we could teach them some warm up to protect their health.

Not only can benefit the elderly, also the home of the elderly. Recently, there was a news about a geriatric nurse was putting the elderly in the outdoor without any clothes to wait for the shower. It showed that they do not have any respectful and has caused a sensation in the community. If we wanted to integrated our society, the activity could improve the relationship between the elderly and the elderly home. Through the showing them around of the inter action, the nurses can know more the elderly feelings. On top of this, the community can have trust in the elderly home. Therefore, we could have a beautiful community.

Overall, for the elderly, we could showing them around; for the community, we could regain the public trust with the elderly home. Hopefully, my suggestion could be accepted. Thank you for your consideration!

Your Sincerely,
Chris Wong
The Social Service Club Chairperson
此回覆已被刪除

Dear Ms. Lee,

I am Chris, the chairperson of the Social Service Club. Recently, I noticed that the teenagers do not have much caring to the community. To improve the relationship between our school and the society to get closer. I would like to write a letter to suggest an activity and some benefits of an elderly home to be carried out.

The elderly contributed to our community a lot when they were young, they may miss the time of enjoying the city, therefore, we could show them around to give more inspiration and caring to them. Their children sent their parents to the elderly home, they may not have confidence and feeling alone. We can cooperation with the charity for helping the elderly, like The Hong Kong Society for the aged(HKSA). Our Social Service Club is planning to take them to visit some country parks with a geriatric nurse and as the HKSA have experienced in outings. They could provide good services and caring for them. The old people do not have enough exercises would lead to diseases, and the suburbs have more fresh air could refresh their mind to think positively. We could also teach them some warm up exercise to enhance their health.

Not only can benefit to the elderly, but also the home of the elderly. Recently, there was a news about the naked elderly was putted in the outdoor to wait for a shower by the nurse. It showed that they do not have any respectful and has caused a sensation in the community. If we wanted to integrate our society, the activity could improve the relationship between the elderly and the elderly home. Through showing them around of the inter action, the nurses have a better understanding of the elderly feelings. On top of this, the community can trust in the elderly home. Therefore, we could have a beautiful community.

Overall, for the elderly, we could show them around; for the community, we could regain the public trust with the elderly home. Hopefully, my suggestion could be accepted.

Thank you for your consideration!

Yours Sincerely,
Signature
Chris Wong
Chairperson
Social Service Club

Dear Ms. Lee,

Proposal on the community project for the elderly

The elderly caring has become the talk of the town, as the poor settings of an elderly home could directly undermine the quality of the life for the elderly. For instance, the human resources of the nurses are insufficient, resulting in elderly abuse. To do away with the elderly plight, through improving the working environments of the nurses and advancing their relationship. Therefore, I am writing a proposal to address the measure with an activity and its benefits that our school could be carried out.

It is not common to see that the elderly living in the elderly home, might go to the extreme as they do not express their feelings appropriately. They would feel depressed and helpless, some of them are not even sociable. That is the reason why we have to hold the activity. We could cooperate with the geriatric nurse and also the charity, The Hong Kong Society for the Aged(SAGE). The SAGE is experienced in providing fitness exercise, community education and pressure relieving services. Therefore, the elderly could come out of the shadows and encouragement to make friends with those services under the professional education from the SAGE. Besides, that the school is willing to tackle the caring problem between the elderly and the geriatric nurse is a big leap forward in enhancing an inclusive society.

The activity brings several benefits to the elderly home. It can arouse the students and the nurses attention in society. Closely connected with this can boost the elderly confidence. The cooperating could have more communication with the nurses and the teenagers, in order to improve the relationship and provide better services of caring for the elderly. With the better understanding of their feelings, they are dared to get friends of expressing their own emotion actively. On top of this, the community can trust in the elderly home. Therefore, we could have a harmonious community.

Overall, to provide the better living standard for the elderly, we could hold the activity to enhance their physical and psychological health. And we could regain the trust of the public of the elderly home. Hopefully, my suggestion can be accepted.

Thank you for your consideration!

Yours Sincerely,
Signature
Chris Wong
Chairperson, The Social Service Club

係wor 我諗返起....
唔該哂你 我改返啦

最尾句Hopefully, my suggestion can be accepted 唔太好，亦都唔適合

呢句Grammar係無錯，嚴格少少就suggestionS, 但唔係重點。can太肯定同唔夠有禮貌，要用d hedging words, 例如would/could, 不過呢度唔適宜用passive voice, 用番active voice會比較好，因為主角係Ms. Lee。Hopefully用得唔準，通常講d wish, 例如Hopefully the thesis report of my research project should be completed by the end of August.

我會改做，
I would be grateful if you could (kindly) consider my / the aforementioned suggestions.

句結尾就改其他，例如 Thank you very much for your kind attention.

其他就得閒再睇

最尾句Hopefully, my suggestion can be accepted 唔太好，亦都唔適合

呢句Grammar係無錯，嚴格少少就suggestionS, 但唔係重點。can太肯定同唔夠有禮貌，要用d hedging words, 例如would/could, 不過呢度唔適宜用passive voice, 用番active voice會比較好，因為主角係Ms. Lee。Hopefully用得唔準，通常講d wish, 例如Hopefully the thesis report of my research project should be completed by the end of August.

我會改做，
I would be grateful if you could (kindly) consider my / the aforementioned suggestions.

句結尾就改其他，例如 Thank you very much for your kind attention.

其他就得閒再睇
